title: Celectra During Pregnancy
description: Celectra at age 22, carrying the twins, Jenni and Xara.

title: Celectra's Cabinet of Stones
description: An illuminated cabinet containing Celectra's rock collection including large, precious stones that Galanstanians leave behind as insoluble waste.

title: Artificial Neural Interface
description: The experimental ANI device that allows neural linking between humans and Galinstanian consciousness and, eventually, Utara.

title: The Deep Caves
description: Entrance to the extensive cave system explored over fourteen years. These caves hold ancient Galinstanian secrets.

title: Utopis Station Living Room
description: The Carisco family's living quarters aboard the Utopis space station, featuring a view of Ares.

title: The Carisco Family Portrait
description: A formal portrait of the Carisco family from Book 2, showing the growing family.

title: Galinstanian Being
description: A rare capture of a Galinstanian in their natural form, displaying the characteristic quicksilver reflections.

title: Listener Corps Emblem
description: The elite Listener Corps, trained to communicate with Galinstanian consciousness through neural interfaces.
